title: POV: You Blew Your Funded Account The Day Before GDP
description: POV: You sized up right before a high-impact GDP release and watched your funded account vanish in minutes. Sound familiar? Here's the one rule the R2F Trading system follows every single time a major news event is 24 hours away — and how traders are protecting their accounts while others blow up. This is the play. #ICTTrading #FundedTrader #SmartMoneyConcepts
script: You just got funded. Account's live. GDP drops tomorrow. You size up anyway. News hits. Price spikes 80 points in 4 seconds. Your stop never filled. Account blown. Third one this year. And it was all avoidable. Here's what smart money does before GDP. They hunt liquidity first. Price sweeps a key high. Leaves a fair value gap. That's the real entry zone. The R2F Trading system flags GDP windows. No trades 4 hours before. Only after the sweep confirms. Protect your account this GDP. Follow R2F Trading. Daily setups. Free playbook at r2ftrading.com.
